title: The Book of Arda Viraf: Journey Through Heaven and Hell
description: A Zoroastrian priest drinks a sacred potion and travels through the seven levels of heaven and the punishments of hell.
introduction: A Zoroastrian priest drinks a sacred potion and travels through the seven levels of heaven and the punishments of hell.

translation.text: Then Arda Viraf saw the souls of the righteous in the highest heaven, bathed in light, at peace forever.
